{{Quote|Fafnir an' his hairy hordes have ''power skis'', but to catch up with the ''sled'', we need the likes of this ''snow flyer''--|Colonel Odan|<ref name="death trap" />}}
'''Power skis''' were small [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] used primarily on the ice [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Akuria II]]. They could not match the speed of the much larger [[snow flyer]]s, and were decidedly less powerful, not sporting weapons or any type of armor to keep the pilot from harm. A set of power skis were hidden on [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Odan]]'s [[War Sled]] in the event of an emergency.
